name: Chaithanya Kumar Gogula
title: Senior VMware Administrator | Cloud & Virtualization Specialist
about: Senior VMware & Cloud Engineer with 9+ years of experience managing enterprise-scale virtualization, OCI cloud infrastructure, and datacenter operations. Proven expertise in VMware, OLVM (KVM), and cloud migration projects delivering highly available and secure environments.

points: Managing 50,000+ VMs and large-scale ESXi infrastructure
Handled OCI VM deployments and lifecycle management
Worked on OLVM (KVM) deployments and administration
Led migration projects across platforms (VMware, Citrix, Cloud)
